_annotations.city: City name used in the Google Maps query and the default CSV filename.
_annotations.country: Country context for the Maps query. Use the English or local country name that gives best Maps results.
_annotations.searchTerm: Venue category to search, for example restaurant, Café, bar, hotel, bakery, or museum.
_annotations.depth: Maximum number of Google Maps venues to collect from the search results before scraping review details.
_annotations.locale: Browser locale. Keep de-DE for the current German deletion-notice text parser.
_annotations.googleMapsUrl: Google Maps entry point. google.de/maps is recommended for German UI text.
_annotations.headed: true opens a visible browser, which is recommended because Google may require manual interaction.
_annotations.resumeMode: pause keeps the browser open for manual intervention; stop saves state and exits on blockers.
_annotations.outputCsvPath: Optional. If omitted, the scraper writes output/deleted-reviews-city-searchterm.csv.
_annotations.statePath: Checkpoint file used to continue interrupted runs.
_annotations.browserProfileDir: Persistent browser profile directory for cookies/session reuse.
_annotations.navigationTimeoutMs: Timeout for page loads and Playwright actions.
_annotations.actionDelay: Random delay range between actions to keep the run slow and observable.
_annotations.resultScrollDelayMs: Delay after scrolling the Google Maps results panel.
_annotations.maxResultScrolls: Safety limit for result-panel scrolling during discovery.
